creator: siegerstein@pochta.ru
text:
diff -urN blender-devel.old/Makefile blender-devel/Makefile
--- blender-devel.old/Makefile  Wed Jul 25 00:17:21 2007
+++ blender-devel/Makefile      Thu Jul 26 03:07:57 2007
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@

 PORTNAME=      blender
 PORTVERSION=   2.44
+PORTREVISION=  1
 CATEGORIES=    graphics games
 MASTER_SITES=  http://download.blender.org/source/ \
                http://mirror.cs.umn.edu/blender.org/source/ \
@@ -85,5 +86,7 @@

 do-install:
        @${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/obj/freebsd/bin/blender ${PREFIX}/bin
+       @${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
+       @${CP} -Rp "${WRKSRC}/bin/" ${DATADIR}

 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -urN blender-devel.old/pkg-message blender-devel/pkg-message
--- blender-devel.old/pkg-message       Thu Jan  1 03:00:00 1970
+++ blender-devel/pkg-message   Thu Jul 26 03:04:38 2007
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+For not English-speaking users:
+
+cp -R /usr/local/share/blender/.blender ~
+
+In Blender:
+User Preferences -> International Fonts:
+  Press: Tooltips, Buttons, Toolbox
+  and select your language.
+File -> Save Defaults Settings (Ctrl-U)
